root_cause: ElastiCache Redis cluster unreachable due to security group misconfiguration
error_message: Error connecting to Redis: Connection refused
evidence: Security group rules updated 1 hour ago
Application security group removed from Redis ingress rules
resolution: Added application security group to Redis cluster security group ingress rules
fix_commands: aws ec2 authorize-security-group-ingress --group-id sg-redis123 --protocol tcp --port 6379 --source-group sg-app456
preventive_measures: Use infrastructure-as-code for security group rules
Test connectivity after security group changes
Add CloudWatch alarm for Redis connection failures
Implement connection retry logic with exponential backoff
